title: Cleaning the River Park
subtitle: 初中示范课
summary: 围绕环保、志愿活动和团队协作组织的初中句子练习。

sentences.en: Our class joins a weekend cleanup near the river park.
sentences.zh: 我们班参加了河边公园的周末清洁活动。

sentences.en: Some students pick up bottles while others sort the waste.
sentences.zh: 一些学生捡瓶子，另一些学生分类垃圾。

sentences.en: The guide explains why plastic is harmful to birds and fish.
sentences.zh: 向导解释了为什么塑料会伤害鸟类和鱼类。

sentences.en: After the activity, we feel tired but proud of our work.
sentences.zh: 活动结束后，我们虽然很累，但为自己的工作感到自豪。
